title: Surface-to-Surface Contact (Standard)
content:
接触分析 摩擦 接触对 面面接触 主从面 Contact Friction
Create contact interaction between two surfaces in Abaqus/Standard.

1. Create interaction property with friction:
mdb.models['Model'].ContactProperty('IntProp')
mdb.models['Model'].interactionProperties['IntProp'].TangentialBehavior(formulation=PENALTY, fraction=0.005, table=((0.3, ), ))
mdb.models['Model'].interactionProperties['IntProp'].NormalBehavior(pressureOverclosure=HARD, allowSeparation=ON)

2. Create surface-to-surface contact:
mdb.models['Model'].SurfaceToSurfaceContactStd(
    name='Contact-1',
    createStepName='Step-1',
    master=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Part-1'].surfaces['MasterSurf'],
    slave=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Part-2'].surfaces['SlaveSurf'],
    sliding=FINITE,
    interactionProperty='IntProp'
)
example:
# Create contact property with friction coefficient 0.3
mdb.models['Model'].ContactProperty('IntProp')
mdb.models['Model'].interactionProperties['IntProp'].TangentialBehavior(
    formulation=PENALTY, fraction=0.005, table=((0.3, ), ))
mdb.models['Model'].interactionProperties['IntProp'].NormalBehavior(
    pressureOverclosure=HARD, allowSeparation=ON)

# Create contact pair
mdb.models['Model'].SurfaceToSurfaceContactStd(
    name='Contact-1', createStepName='Step-1',
    master=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Block-1'].surfaces['BottomSurf'],
    slave=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Base-1'].surfaces['TopSurf'],
    sliding=FINITE, interactionProperty='IntProp')

title: Tie Constraint
content:
绑定约束 Tie 绑定 连接面 固连
Create a tie constraint to bond two surfaces together (no relative motion).

mdb.models['Model'].Tie(
    name='Tie-1',
    master=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Part-1'].surfaces['MasterSurf'],
    slave=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Part-2'].surfaces['SlaveSurf'],
    positionToleranceMethod=COMPUTED,
    adjust=ON,
    tieRotations=ON
)

Note: The master surface should be the stiffer/coarser-meshed surface.
example:
# Tie two parts together
mdb.models['Model'].Tie(
    name='Tie-1',
    master=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Flange-1'].surfaces['TopSurf'],
    slave=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Plate-1'].surfaces['BotSurf'],
    positionToleranceMethod=COMPUTED, adjust=ON, tieRotations=ON)

title: Heat Transfer Analysis (Steady-State)
content:
热传导 稳态传热 温度场 导热系数 对流换热 热分析
Steady-state heat transfer analysis setup.

1. Create heat transfer step:
mdb.models['Model'].HeatTransferStep(
    name='HeatStep',
    previous='Initial',
    response=STEADY_STATE,
    maxNumInc=100,
    initialInc=1.0,
    minInc=1e-5,
    maxInc=1.0
)

2. Define thermal conductivity:
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Steel'].Conductivity(table=((50.0, ), ))

3. Apply temperature BC:
mdb.models['Model'].TemperatureBC(
    name='HotEnd',
    createStepName='HeatStep',
    region=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Part-1'].sets['HotFace'],
    magnitude=100.0
)

4. Apply convection (surface film condition):
mdb.models['Model'].FilmCondition(
    name='Convection',
    createStepName='HeatStep',
    surface=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Part-1'].surfaces['OuterSurf'],
    filmCoeff=10.0,
    sinkTemperature=25.0
)

5. Use DC3D8 elements for 3D heat transfer:
mdb.models['Model'].parts['Part'].setElementType(
    elemTypes=(ElemType(elemCode=DC3D8, elemLibrary=STANDARD), ),
    regions=(cells, )
)
example:
# Steady-state heat transfer
mdb.models['Model'].HeatTransferStep(name='HeatStep', previous='Initial',
    response=STEADY_STATE)
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Steel'].Conductivity(table=((50.0, ), ))
mdb.models['Model'].TemperatureBC(name='HotEnd', createStepName='HeatStep',
    region=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Bar-1'].sets['LeftFace'],
    magnitude=200.0)
mdb.models['Model'].TemperatureBC(name='ColdEnd', createStepName='HeatStep',
    region=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Bar-1'].sets['RightFace'],
    magnitude=25.0)

title: Heat Transfer Analysis (Transient)
content:
瞬态传热 瞬态热分析 比热容 时间相关热载荷
Transient heat transfer analysis with time-dependent thermal loading.

1. Create transient heat transfer step:
mdb.models['Model'].HeatTransferStep(
    name='TransientHeat',
    previous='Initial',
    response=TRANSIENT,
    timePeriod=100.0,
    maxNumInc=1000,
    initialInc=0.1,
    minInc=1e-6,
    maxInc=10.0
)

2. Define specific heat (required for transient):
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Steel'].SpecificHeat(table=((480.0, ), ))
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Steel'].Density(table=((7.85e-9, ), ))
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Steel'].Conductivity(table=((50.0, ), ))
example:
# Transient heat transfer
mdb.models['Model'].HeatTransferStep(name='TransientHeat', previous='Initial',
    response=TRANSIENT, timePeriod=100.0, initialInc=0.1, maxInc=10.0)
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Steel'].SpecificHeat(table=((480.0, ), ))
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Steel'].Density(table=((7.85e-9, ), ))
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Steel'].Conductivity(table=((50.0, ), ))

title: Buckling Analysis (Linear Eigenvalue)
content:
屈曲分析 稳定性 临界载荷 特征值屈曲 失稳
Linear eigenvalue buckling analysis to find critical buckling loads.

1. Create static step with preload:
mdb.models['Model'].StaticStep(name='Preload', previous='Initial')

2. Create buckling step:
mdb.models['Model'].BuckleStep(
    name='Buckle',
    previous='Preload',
    numEigen=5,
    maxIterations=30
)

3. Apply reference load in preload step, buckling analysis finds load multipliers.

Note: The eigenvalues represent load multipliers. Critical buckling load = eigenvalue x applied load.
example:
# Linear buckling analysis
mdb.models['Model'].StaticStep(name='Preload', previous='Initial')
mdb.models['Model'].BuckleStep(name='Buckle', previous='Preload', numEigen=5)
# Apply unit load in Preload step
# Eigenvalues give critical load multipliers

title: General Contact (Abaqus/Explicit)
content:
通用接触 显式接触 自接触 全局接触 碰撞
Define general contact for Abaqus/Explicit analysis (all-with-self).

mdb.models['Model'].ContactExp(
    name='GeneralContact',
    createStepName='Step-1'
)
mdb.models['Model'].interactions['GeneralContact'].includedPairs.setValuesInStep(
    stepName='Step-1',
    useAllstar=ON
)

# Set contact properties
mdb.models['Model'].ContactProperty('ExpProp')
mdb.models['Model'].interactionProperties['ExpProp'].TangentialBehavior(
    formulation=PENALTY, table=((0.3, ), ))
mdb.models['Model'].interactionProperties['ExpProp'].NormalBehavior(
    pressureOverclosure=HARD, allowSeparation=ON)
mdb.models['Model'].interactions['GeneralContact'].contactPropertyAssignments.appendInStep(
    stepName='Step-1',
    assignments=((GLOBAL, SELF, 'ExpProp'), )
)
example:
# General contact in explicit analysis
mdb.models['Model'].ContactExp(name='GC', createStepName='Impact')
mdb.models['Model'].interactions['GC'].includedPairs.setValuesInStep(
    stepName='Impact', useAllstar=ON)
mdb.models['Model'].ContactProperty('ExpProp')
mdb.models['Model'].interactionProperties['ExpProp'].TangentialBehavior(
    formulation=PENALTY, table=((0.2, ), ))
mdb.models['Model'].interactionProperties['ExpProp'].NormalBehavior(
    pressureOverclosure=HARD)
mdb.models['Model'].interactions['GC'].contactPropertyAssignments.appendInStep(
    stepName='Impact', assignments=((GLOBAL, SELF, 'ExpProp'), ))

title: Coupling Constraint
content:
耦合约束 分布耦合 参考点 运动耦合 刚性耦合
Create a coupling constraint to distribute loads from a reference point to a surface.

1. Create reference point:
mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.ReferencePoint(point=(x, y, z))

2. Create coupling:
mdb.models['Model'].Coupling(
    name='Coupling-1',
    controlPoint=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.sets['RefPoint'],
    surface=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Part-1'].surfaces['CoupledSurf'],
    influenceRadius=WHOLE_SURFACE,
    couplingType=DISTRIBUTING,
    localCsys=None,
    u1=ON, u2=ON, u3=ON, ur1=ON, ur2=ON, ur3=ON
)
example:
# Create reference point and coupling
rp = mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.ReferencePoint(point=(100.0, 50.0, 0.0))
rp_region = mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.Set(name='RefPoint',
    referencePoints=(mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.referencePoints[rp.id], ))
mdb.models['Model'].Coupling(name='Coupling-1',
    controlPoint=rp_region,
    surface=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Beam-1'].surfaces['EndSurf'],
    influenceRadius=WHOLE_SURFACE, couplingType=DISTRIBUTING)

title: MPC Constraint (Multi-Point Constraint)
content:
多点约束 MPC 刚性连接 铰接
Create MPC constraint (Beam or Pin type) between surfaces.

mdb.models['Model'].MultipointConstraint(
    name='MPC-1',
    controlPoint=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.sets['RefPoint'],
    surface=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Part-1'].surfaces['Surf'],
    mpcType=BEAM_MPC  # or PIN_MPC
)

title: Bolt Load (Pre-tension)
content:
螺栓预紧力 螺栓载荷 预紧 Bolt
Apply bolt pre-tension load.

1. Create a datum plane to cut the bolt (for pre-tension section).
2. Partition the bolt part at the datum plane.
3. Create bolt load:
mdb.models['Model'].BoltLoad(
    name='Bolt-1',
    createStepName='Step-1',
    region=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Bolt-1'].surfaces['BoltCut'],
    magnitude=25000.0,
    boltMethod=APPLY_FORCE
)
example:
# Apply bolt pretension
mdb.models['Model'].BoltLoad(name='Bolt-1', createStepName='Pretension',
    region=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Bolt-1'].surfaces['CutSection'],
    magnitude=25000.0, boltMethod=APPLY_FORCE)

title: Spring/Dashpot Element
content:
弹簧单元 阻尼器 弹簧刚度 弹簧连接
Create spring elements between nodes or between a node and ground.

mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.engineeringFeatures.SpringDashpotToGround(
    name='Spring-1',
    region=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Part-1'].sets['SpringNode'],
    orientation=None,
    dof=2,
    springBehavior=ON,
    springStiffness=1000.0,
    dashpotBehavior=OFF
)

For spring between two nodes:
mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.engineeringFeatures.TwoPointSpringDashpot(
    name='Spring-2',
    regionPairs=((region1, region2), ),
    axis=FIXED_DOF,
    dof1=1, dof2=1,
    springBehavior=ON, springStiffness=500.0
)
example:
# Ground spring in Y direction (dof=2)
mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.engineeringFeatures.SpringDashpotToGround(
    name='Spring-1',
    region=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Mass-1'].sets['CenterNode'],
    dof=2, springBehavior=ON, springStiffness=1000.0, dashpotBehavior=OFF)

title: Rigid Body Constraint
content:
刚体约束 刚体 参考点控制
Create a rigid body constraint to make a region rigid, controlled by a reference point.

1. Create reference point on the assembly.
2. Define rigid body:
mdb.models['Model'].RigidBody(
    name='Rigid-1',
    refPointRegion=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.sets['RefPoint'],
    bodyRegion=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Part-1'].sets['RigidRegion']
)
example:
# Rigid body constraint
rp = mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.ReferencePoint(point=(50.0, 0.0, 0.0))
rp_set = mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.Set(name='RP',
    referencePoints=(mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.referencePoints[rp.id], ))
mdb.models['Model'].RigidBody(name='Rigid-1', refPointRegion=rp_set,
    bodyRegion=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Hammer-1'].sets['All'])

title: Amplitude Definition
content:
幅值 时间曲线 载荷随时间变化 脉冲载荷 加载历程
Define time-varying amplitude for loads or BCs.

mdb.models['Model'].TabularAmplitude(
    name='Amp-1',
    timeSpan=STEP,
    smooth=SOLVER_DEFAULT,
    data=((0.0, 0.0), (0.5, 1.0), (1.0, 1.0))
)

Apply amplitude to a load:
mdb.models['Model'].ConcentratedForce(
    name='Load-1', createStepName='Step-1',
    region=..., cf2=-1000.0,
    amplitude='Amp-1'
)
example:
# Ramp amplitude: 0->1 over half the step, then hold
mdb.models['Model'].TabularAmplitude(name='Ramp',
    timeSpan=STEP, data=((0.0, 0.0), (0.5, 1.0), (1.0, 1.0)))
# Apply to a pressure load
mdb.models['Model'].Pressure(name='Pulse', createStepName='Impact',
    region=surf_region, magnitude=50.0, amplitude='Ramp')

title: Thermal-Mechanical Coupled Analysis
content:
热力耦合 温度位移耦合 热膨胀 热应力
Coupled temperature-displacement analysis.

1. Create coupled step:
mdb.models['Model'].CoupledTempDisplacementStep(
    name='CoupledStep',
    previous='Initial',
    response=TRANSIENT,
    timePeriod=10.0,
    maxNumInc=100,
    initialInc=0.1,
    minInc=1e-5,
    maxInc=1.0,
    deltmx=10.0
)

2. Define thermal expansion:
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Steel'].Expansion(table=((1.2e-5, ), ))

3. Use C3D8T elements (coupled temp-displacement):
mdb.models['Model'].parts['Part'].setElementType(
    elemTypes=(ElemType(elemCode=C3D8T, elemLibrary=STANDARD), ),
    regions=(cells, )
)
example:
# Coupled thermal-mechanical step
mdb.models['Model'].CoupledTempDisplacementStep(
    name='CoupledStep', previous='Initial', response=TRANSIENT,
    timePeriod=10.0, initialInc=0.1, deltmx=10.0)
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Steel'].Expansion(table=((1.2e-5, ), ))

title: Predefined Temperature Field
content:
预定义温度场 温度载荷 初始温度 热应力分析
Apply predefined temperature field (for thermal stress analysis without coupled analysis).

mdb.models['Model'].Temperature(
    name='TempField',
    createStepName='Step-1',
    region=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Part-1'].sets['All'],
    magnitudes=(100.0, )
)

For initial temperature:
mdb.models['Model'].Temperature(
    name='InitialTemp',
    createStepName='Initial',
    region=mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.instances['Part-1'].sets['All'],
    magnitudes=(25.0, )
)
example:
# Set initial temperature = 25C, then heat to 100C in Step-1
mdb.models['Model'].Temperature(name='InitTemp', createStepName='Initial',
    region=all_set, magnitudes=(25.0, ))
mdb.models['Model'].Temperature(name='HeatUp', createStepName='Step-1',
    region=all_set, magnitudes=(100.0, ))
# Need thermal expansion coefficient defined in material

title: Connector Section (Beam, Hinge, etc.)
content:
连接器 铰接 梁连接 连接单元
Create connector elements between parts (e.g., beam connector, hinge, etc.).

1. Create connector section:
mdb.models['Model'].ConnectorSection(
    name='BeamConn',
    assembledType=BEAM
)

2. Create wire feature and assign connector:
mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.WirePolyLine(
    points=((pointA, pointB), ),
    mergeType=IMPRINT,
    meshable=OFF
)
mdb.models['Model'].rootAssembly.SectionAssignment(
    sectionName='BeamConn',
    region=wireRegion
)
example:
# Create beam connector between two parts
mdb.models['Model'].ConnectorSection(name='BeamConn', assembledType=BEAM)
# Create wire and assign connector section

title: Submodeling
content:
子模型 局部细化分析 子模型边界条件 全局驱动
Submodeling technique: use global model results as boundary conditions for a local refined model.

1. Create submodel boundary condition:
mdb.models['SubModel'].SubmodelBC(
    name='Submodel-BC',
    createStepName='Step-1',
    region=mdb.models['SubModel'].rootAssembly.instances['Local-1'].sets['BoundaryFaces'],
    dof=(1, 2, 3),
    globalStep='Step-1',
    globalDrivingRegion='',
    absoluteExteriorTolerance=0.0,
    exteriorTolerance=0.05,
    globalIncrement=0
)

2. Specify global model ODB:
mdb.models['SubModel'].setValues(globalJob='GlobalJobName')
example:
# Submodel driven by global model results
mdb.models['SubModel'].setValues(globalJob='GlobalJob')
mdb.models['SubModel'].SubmodelBC(name='SubBC', createStepName='Step-1',
    region=boundary_set, dof=(1, 2, 3), globalStep='Step-1')

title: Cohesive Zone / Cohesive Elements
content:
内聚力单元 粘聚区 分层 界面失效 脱粘
Cohesive zone modeling for delamination or interface failure.

1. Define cohesive material:
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Cohesive'].MaxsDamageInitiation(
    table=((50.0, 50.0, 50.0), ))
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Cohesive'].maxsDamageInitiation.DamageEvolution(
    type=ENERGY, table=((1.0, ), ))
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Cohesive'].Elastic(
    type=TRACTION, table=((1e6, 1e6, 1e6), ))

2. Create cohesive section:
mdb.models['Model'].CohesiveSection(
    name='CohSec',
    material='Cohesive',
    response=TRACTION_SEPARATION,
    outOfPlaneThickness=None
)
example:
# Cohesive zone material and section
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Cohesive'].Elastic(
    type=TRACTION, table=((1e6, 1e6, 1e6), ))
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Cohesive'].MaxsDamageInitiation(
    table=((50.0, 50.0, 50.0), ))
mdb.models['Model'].materials['Cohesive'].maxsDamageInitiation.DamageEvolution(
    type=ENERGY, table=((1.0, ), ))
mdb.models['Model'].CohesiveSection(name='CohSec', material='Cohesive',
    response=TRACTION_SEPARATION)
